page_metadata.biotools__summary: CoV-Seq is a suite of tools and datasets for analysis and visualization of genomes of SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19. Sequences are collected from four major repositories: GISAID, NCBI, EMBL and CNGB.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CoV-Seq is a suite of tools and datasets for analysis and visualization of genomes of SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19. Sequences are collected from four major repositories: GISAID, NCBI, EMBL and CNGB.
